# PHIL.155 ? Zero-Based Resource Allocation

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** resource_allocation
**Subcategory:** zero_based_resource_allocation
**Domain:** RESOURCE_ALLOCATION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Justify all resource allocation from scratch, not historically

## Application
Question existing allocations, reallocate based on current priorities, avoid inertia
